urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
The luminous moon lighting my way
english translation text:
The rising sun that brightens my day
Heaven without you would be in flames
You're the heaven of Karbala

Your visitors offer you their hands
How can the water lose to the sand
How can the thirst win in Karbala
Wai. They are reciting in karbala

The hand of god that nurturers the young
Speaking for Allah you are the tongue
Separating his right from the wrong

The ship that sails swiftly through the waves
And whoever boards your ship is saved
Immune from the punishment of the grave
Whoever mourned you in Karbala

When. When will we meet again ya Hussain
When. Under your done will I grieve aaAqagain
From. Najaf will I walk to Karbala
